goal: Reduce ambiguity around the remaining NodeMCPHost OAuth token acquisition held risk by either proving the supported boundary or locking the non-goal into a tracked contract.
successCriteria: The OAuth token acquisition held risk is narrower or more explicitly bounded than it is today.
Verification report and tracked decision can explain the supported OAuth boundary without relying on transcript-only notes.
NodeMCPHost remains beta held unless new evidence explicitly justifies more.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No new public MCP runtime surface.
